info.title: Groom Package References in Azure DevOps
info.description: Supports configuration via --config path/to/config.json with named feeds and PAT authentication.

options.name: --config
options.description: Load configuration from JSON file

options.name: --organization
options.description: Azure DevOps organization URL

options.name: --token
options.description: Personal Access Token

options.name: --project
options.description: Project name (optional, scans all projects if not specified)

options.name: --max-repos
options.description: Maximum number of repositories to scan (default: 100)

options.name: --include-archived
options.description: Include archived repositories

options.name: --resolve-nuget
options.description: Resolve NuGet package information (default: true)

options.name: --skip-nuget
options.description: Skip NuGet package resolution

options.name: --include-packages-config
options.description: Include legacy packages.config references in scan

options.name: --detailed
options.description: Show detailed package information

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable debug logging (automatically enabled when debugger attached)

options.name: --feed
options.description: Add NuGet feed URL

options.name: --feed-auth
options.description: Feed authentication: feedName|username|pat

options.name: --export-packages
options.description: Export package results to file (format via --export-format)

options.name: --export-warnings
options.description: Export version warnings to a separate file

options.name: --export-format
options.description: Export format: Json or Csv (default: Json)

options.name: --export-sbom
options.description: Export SPDX 3.0.0 SBOM (Software Bill of Materials) as JSON-LD

options.name: --exclude-prefix
options.description: Exclude packages starting with prefix (e.g., Microsoft.)

options.name: --exclude-package
options.description: Exclude specific package by exact name

options.name: --exclude-pattern
options.description: Exclude packages matching regex pattern

options.name: --exclude-project
options.description: Exclude project files matching regex pattern (.csproj, .vbproj, .fsproj)

options.name: --exclude-repo
options.description: Exclude repositories matching regex pattern (e.g., "Legacy-.*")

options.name: --include-repo
options.description: Include only repositories matching regex pattern (repeatable, processed in order)

options.name: --no-default-exclusions
options.description: Don't exclude Microsoft.* and System.* by default

options.name: --case-sensitive
options.description: Use case-sensitive package name matching

options.name: --case-sensitive-project
options.description: Use case-sensitive project file matching

options.name: --update-references
options.description: Enable auto-update mode (creates branches and PRs)

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show planned updates without creating branches/PRs

options.name: --update-scope
options.description: Version update scope: Patch, Minor, or Major (default: Patch)

options.name: --source-branch
options.description: Source branch pattern to branch from (default: same as target-branch)

options.name: --target-branch
options.description: Target branch pattern for PRs (default: develop/*)

options.name: --feature-branch
options.description: Feature branch name prefix (default: feature/update-nuget-references)

options.name: --source-packages-only
options.description: Only update packages that have source code in scanned repositories

options.name: --required-reviewer
options.description: Add a required PR reviewer (repeatable, must approve)

options.name: --optional-reviewer
options.description: Add an optional PR reviewer (repeatable, notified only)

options.name: --tag-commits
options.description: Create a lightweight git tag on the feature branch commit

options.name: --no-incremental-prs
options.description: Skip repos that already have open NuGroom PRs (exit with warning)

options.name: --ignore-renovate
options.description:
Skip reading renovate.json from repositories
Version Increment Options (applied to projects with updated references):

options.name: --increment-project-version
options.description: Increment <Version> (Patch, Minor, or Major; default: Patch)

options.name: --increment-project-assemblyversion
options.description: Increment <AssemblyVersion>

options.name: --increment-project-fileversion
options.description: Increment <FileVersion>

options.name: --increment-project-version-all
options.description: Increment all three version properties

options.name: --sync
options.description:
Sync a specific package to a version across all repos (creates PRs)
If version is omitted, the latest available version is used
Repeatable: specify multiple --sync flags to sync several packages

options.name: --migrate-to-cpm
options.description: Migrate projects to use Central Package Management (Directory.Packages.props)

options.name: --per-project
options.description:
Create a Directory.Packages.props per project instead of per repository
(only valid with --migrate-to-cpm)
For detailed help, see README.md
